## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` berhasil tanpa error
- [ ] Tidak ada hardcoded passwords, tokens, atau ports
- [ ] `.env.example` diupdate jika ada env variable baru
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` diupdate di bagian `[Unreleased]`
